Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}It's been quite some time since I last summoned you in your dreams.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Several seasons have come and gone since I first offered you my assistance...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Now, then, your Persona abilities... Have you been using them wisely?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Well, at least your candor is a sign of maturity.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Hmmm... So, it comes to you naturally, does it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}To be direct, I sense a great catastrophe in your future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}But it would be a pity to lose one with such potential as yourself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Therefore, please allow me to provide you with a new form of assistance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I will unlock further secrets of fusion, previously unrevealed to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I am certain that you will find this to be of great benefit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}New combinations have been added to Special Fusion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}But for now, you must be tired. Please, rest easy...[n]{f 1 1}
